name: Rangsiya Gym Taekwondo Pattaya
nameThai: รังสิยา ยิม เทควันโด พัทยา
addressFull: Boonsampan area near Sukhumvit Road Km 1, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Google Maps currently shows a 15:00 opening time; full weekly timetable should be confirmed

federation.evidence: Rangsiya Gym appears in Taekwondo Association of Thailand result files and current national competition charts. That establishes competition participation, not formal academy affiliation or grading portability.

coaches: Kru June Rangsiya Nisaisom, 2011 world champion and 2012 Olympian

praise: Thai parents describe kind teachers, a very clean venue and children who enjoy attending.

sources.label: Google Maps Pattaya branch location and reviews

confidenceReason: The coach pedigree and competition track are strong, but all prices, formal federation/grading status and English instruction are absent.
branchNote: A separate Rangsiya branch in Sattahip has a different address and phone. Its ages, timetable and contact details were not transferred to this Pattaya record.
